description_long: This perfume bottle features a faceted, geometric body with alternating panels of pastel pink and green, each adorned with an intricate gold lattice pattern. The bottle is topped with a matching faceted cap, also decorated with the same color scheme and gold detailing, and separated from the body by a white and gold neck ring. The base is circular and broad, finished in white with gold trim, providing stability and a touch of elegance. The overall design is ornate and luxurious, reminiscent of vintage or decorative collectible bottles. The surface appears glossy and reflective, suggesting a glass or porcelain construction with metallic accents. No visible branding or text is present, emphasizing the bottle's decorative and artisanal qualities.
description: A faceted, pastel-colored perfume bottle with gold lattice patterns and a matching ornate cap, finished with white and gold accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical, faceted body with alternating pink and green panels and a centered, pointed cap.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlights the bottle's geometric facets and the reflective quality of the gold and pastel surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, emphasizing the bottle's symmetry and the continuous decorative pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view reveals the bottle's broad base and the interplay of colors and gold detailing.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The cap is faceted and conical, matching the bottle's geometric style, with alternating pink and green panels and gold lattice patterns. It is separated from the bottle by a white and gold neck ring and appears to be removable, serving both decorative and functional purposes.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The silhouette is a vertically symmetrical, faceted diamond shape with a broad circular base and a pointed, conical cap.
attribute_decorative_elements: alternating pastel pink and green color scheme
gold trim on base and neck
